title: ctenopteris lasiostipes
intro: Ctenopteris lasiostipes, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris lasiostipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
